mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, role, ref_id refId FROM user WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT l.*, GROUP_CONCAT(lc.category_id ORDER BY lc.category_id) category_ids FROM lawyer l LEFT JOIN lawyer_category lc ON l.id=lc.lawyer_id AND lc.status=1 WHERE l.id=#{id} GROUP BY l.id
SELECT * FROM customer WHERE id=#{id}
SELECT * FROM legal_category WHERE status=1 ORDER BY id
SELECT * FROM legal_category WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE legal_category SET name=#{name},description=#{description}, base_price=#{basePrice},status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lawyer_category WHERE category_id=#{id})+ (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM consult_appointment WHERE category_id=#{id})

SELECT DISTINCT l.id,l.name,l.gender,l.phone,l.license_no,l.experience_years,l.introduction,l.avatar_url, c.base_price FROM lawyer l JOIN lawyer_category lc ON l.id=lc.lawyer_id AND lc.status=1 JOIN legal_category c ON lc.category_id=c.id AND c.status=1 JOIN lawyer_schedule s ON l.id=s.lawyer_id AND s.status=0 WHERE l.status=1 AND lc.category_id=#{categoryId} AND s.start_time <= #{startTime} AND s.end_time >= #{endTime} AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM consult_appointment a WHERE a.lawyer_id=l.id AND a.status IN(0,1,3) AND a.start_time < #{endTime} AND a.end_time > #{startTime} ) ORDER BY l.experience_years DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user WHERE role=#{role} AND ref_id=#{refId}
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM consult_appointment WHERE lawyer_id=#{lawyerId} AND status IN(0,1,3))+ (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM consult_order WHERE lawyer_id=#{lawyerId} AND status IN(0,1))
SELECT * FROM lawyer_schedule WHERE id=#{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lawyer_category WHERE lawyer_id=#{lawyerId} AND category_id=#{categoryId} AND status=1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lawyer_schedule WHERE lawyer_id=#{lawyerId} AND status=0 AND start_time <= #{startTime} AND end_time >= #{endTime}
SELECT * FROM consult_appointment WHERE id=#{id}

SELECT a.*,c.name customer_name,c.phone customer_phone,l.name lawyer_name,lc.name category_name, o.id order_id,o.status order_status FROM consult_appointment a JOIN customer c ON a.customer_id=c.id JOIN lawyer l ON a.lawyer_id=l.id JOIN legal_category lc ON a.category_id=lc.id LEFT JOIN consult_order o ON o.appointment_id=a.id AND o.status!=4
AND a.customer_id=#{refId} AND a.lawyer_id=#{refId} AND a.status IN(1,3) AND a.status=#{status}
AND (a.appointment_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR c.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR l.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE consult_appointment SET status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM consult_order WHERE id=#{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM consult_order WHERE appointment_id=#{appointmentId} AND status IN(0,1,3)

SELECT o.*,a.appointment_no,c.name customer_name,l.name lawyer_name,lc.name category_name FROM consult_order o JOIN consult_appointment a ON o.appointment_id=a.id JOIN customer c ON o.customer_id=c.id JOIN lawyer l ON o.lawyer_id=l.id JOIN legal_category lc ON o.category_id=lc.id
AND o.customer_id=#{refId} AND o.lawyer_id=#{refId} AND o.status=#{status}
AND (o.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR c.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR l.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
ORDER BY o.order_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lawyer_update_apply WHERE lawyer_id=#{lawyerId} AND status=0
SELECT * FROM lawyer_update_apply WHERE id=#{id}

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM consult_appointment a WHERE 1=1 ) appointment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM consult_appointment a WHERE DATE(a.create_time)=CURDATE()) today_appointment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM consult_order o WHERE 1=1 ) order_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM consult_order o WHERE o.status IN(1,3) AND DATE_FORMAT(o.order_time,'%Y-%m')=DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(),'%Y-%m')) month_order_count, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(o.total_amount),0) FROM consult_order o WHERE o.status IN(1,3) ) total_income

SELECT l.id,l.name lawyer_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM consult_appointment a WHERE a.lawyer_id=l.id AND a.start_time >= CONCAT(#{startDate},' 00:00:00') AND a.start_time < DATE_ADD(#{endDate},INTERVAL 1 DAY) ) appointment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM consult_order o WHERE o.lawyer_id=l.id AND o.status IN(1,3) AND o.order_time >= CONCAT(#{startDate},' 00:00:00') AND o.order_time < DATE_ADD(#{endDate},INTERVAL 1 DAY) ) order_count, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(o.total_amount),0) FROM consult_order o WHERE o.lawyer_id=l.id AND o.status IN(1,3) AND o.order_time >= CONCAT(#{startDate},' 00:00:00') AND o.order_time < DATE_ADD(#{endDate},INTERVAL 1 DAY) ) total_amount FROM lawyer l ORDER BY total_amount DESC

SELECT c.id,c.name category_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM consult_appointment a WHERE a.category_id=c.id AND a.start_time >= CONCAT(#{startDate},' 00:00:00') AND a.start_time < DATE_ADD(#{endDate},INTERVAL 1 DAY) ) appointment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM consult_order o WHERE o.category_id=c.id AND o.status IN(1,3) AND o.order_time >= CONCAT(#{startDate},' 00:00:00') AND o.order_time < DATE_ADD(#{endDate},INTERVAL 1 DAY) ) sales_count, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(o.total_amount),0) FROM consult_order o WHERE o.category_id=c.id AND o.status IN(1,3) AND o.order_time >= CONCAT(#{startDate},' 00:00:00') AND o.order_time < DATE_ADD(#{endDate},INTERVAL 1 DAY) ) amount FROM legal_category c ORDER BY amount DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(o.order_time,'%Y-%m-%d') date,COUNT(*) order_count,SUM(o.total_amount) amount FROM consult_order o WHERE o.status IN(1,3)
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(o.order_time,'%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date
